name: Omelette Pakaki Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until yolks are lemon colored.
2. Add salt to taste and garam masala (see recipe under "Garam Masala").
3. Heat 1 tbsp butter in a skillet. Pour in egg mixture and cook an omelette 1/4-inch thick.
4. Cut into small serving pieces. Set aside and keep warm.
5. Salt spinach and cook in a covered saucepan for 5 mins until tender.
6. Grind spinach to a paste.
7. Heat 2 tbsp butter in a saucepan and cook onions, garlic, ginger, and chilies until onions are golden.
8. Add cumin and tomatoes. Cook a few more minutes.
9. Add 1 cup water and simmer for 10 mins.
10. Add omelette pieces and heat them through. Stir lightly a few times.
11. Garnish with coriander leaves.
